response.justification: Strong generalist engineer with 10+ years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, but the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and cloud-platform AI deployments expected at staff level. Most career experience is in web, data integration, and GIS rather than applied GenAI delivery to enterprise customers.
strengths: 10+ years of polyglot engineering across web, data, and embedded systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, talks)
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years building production GenAI/AI-driven solutions
Missing demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, and LLM optimization
Limited customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting experience

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic workflow exposure at re:cinq
Lacks enterprise cloud AI delivery track record
